summary: Iteration 134: Notification system for Employee Portal + WhatsApp channel support tested. Backend 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - notifications displayed in noProfile view with mark as read functionality working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/my/notifications returns {notifications: [], unread_count: int} - correctly fetches user notifications
PUT /api/my/notifications/{id}/read marks notification as read with read_at timestamp - returns 404 for invalid id
PUT /api/my/notifications/read-all marks all user notifications as read - correctly sets unread_count to 0
_send_whatsapp_to_employee function checks whatsapp_config collection - gracefully returns False if Twilio not configured
AI Duty Planner in StaffPerformancePage.jsx includes 'whatsapp' in channels array by default (line 117)
Task reminder processor (process_task_reminders) creates in-app notifications and attempts WhatsApp if channel enabled
Employee Portal noProfile view shows notifications section below 'Profile Not Linked' message with full read/unread UI
seed_data_creation: Main agent seeded 3 notifications for admin and 2 for operator - used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 134: Notification system fully verified. Test data: admin has 3 notifications (Prep Station Check, Check Bathroom, Clean Floor), operator has 2 (Restock Supplies, Clean Floor). Both users have noProfile view since employee profiles not linked. Mark as read and mark all read functionality works - clicking notification removes orange dot and decrements unread count. WhatsApp channel is included in AI Duty Planner (channels: ['push', 'in_app', 'whatsapp']) - Twilio not configured so messages won't send but code doesn't crash.

endpoints: GET /api/my/notifications - returns notifications array and unread_count
notification_api.authentication: All endpoints require valid JWT token

response_structure.notifications: array of {id, title, message, type, read, created_at, user_id, employee_id}
response_structure.unread_count: integer count of notifications where read=false

whatsapp_channel.behavior: Checks whatsapp_config collection, returns False gracefully if Twilio not configured

employee_portal_notifications_ui.noProfile_view: Shows Notifications section with bell icon, unread count, Mark All Read button, notification list
employee_portal_notifications_ui.notification_card: Shows title, message, timestamp, orange dot for unread, click to mark read
employee_portal_notifications_ui.mark_all_read: Button appears when unread > 0, shows success toast when clicked
